title: BetterNations
description: A modern, highly customizable land-claiming & Invasion plugin
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/754424feeee695e0022fa59808d884c796e5acce.png)
Exhausted in pure-PVP wars? Ever wanted to add strategy elements into the game?

Then this plugin is just for you!


## What is BetterNations BetterNations transforms your Minecraft server into a dynamic world of politics, warfare, and nation-building. Players can create their own countries, forge alliances, raise armies, and conquer rivals—all within the blocky universe they love. This plugin brings grand strategy to life in a way that’s both accessible and endlessly engaging. Whether your server has 100+ players online or is just a small SMP with a few friends, this plugin works just fine! ## Modernized & User-friendly - Performance in mind: With asynchronous processing, the plugin wouldn't lag with more than millions of claims! ~~(Yes, I've actually tested...)~~ - Intuitive visual effects with particles & holograms! ## Features ### Nation & Lands - Democracy or dictatorship, it's your choice - Claim territory and expand your borders; protect your homeland from enemies! ### Diplomacy & Warfare - Form alliances or declare war on rival nations - Build armies, strategize battles, and conquer enemy lands - Construct defenses and fortify your lands ### Technology & Crafting - Players can craft weapons and tools for themselves or put them into barracks to train units - The recipes/units are COMPLETELY CUSTOMIZABLE!!! You can even add your own items/units into the game! - The recipes in the plugin by default are only an example. If you are 1.21+ server, you may check out the [repository page](https://gitee.com/jason31416/betternations/tree/main/configurable-translation) for a pre-made crafting system configuration! ## Plugins supported: - Vault (and another economy plugin): For economy integrations - Bluemap (Optional): For web map integrations/border displays If you are a Chinese server owner, you may also join our QQ group chat: 458787362! Chinese translations and support are provided. > The plugin is still in its BETA phase, which means that there might be some issues and bugs, but I will try my best to fix them as soon as possible! > > The GUIs are currently not completed, but their functionalities have been covered by the commands. If you find any issues in the plugin, please report to me via jason31416@163.com. I will try my best to fix it as soon as possible.
